failure_modes.cause: Thermal degradation of TBAB or product crystallization in the 16m capillary at 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement high-pressure alarm and periodic solvent flush cycles

failure_modes.cause: Exothermic cycloaddition exceeding heat removal capacity of PFA tubing in laminar regime (Re=91)
failure_modes.mitigation: Install internal thermocouples at 4m intervals along the 16m length

failure_modes.cause: High viscosity of EG-based DES causing seal wear or erratic pressure regulation
failure_modes.mitigation: Use a diaphragm-style BPR with chemically inert seals (FFKM)

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage or seal failure leads to immediate loss of pressure and solvent boiling
validation_experiments: Long-term stability run (24h) at 120°C to monitor dP increase for signs of DES degradation or fouling
Calorimetric mapping: Measure T_out vs T_set at varying concentrations (0.1M to 1.0M) to quantify adiabatic temperature rise
Solubility stress test: Cool the reactor to 20°C post-reaction to identify potential precipitation points in the 16m line
